title: Better With Tails!
description: Assetpacks that allow you to have ears, tails, and horns in BTA!
body:
**Currently only works on 8.X+!**
Assetpacks for Better Than Adventure! that allow your player to have ears, tails, and horns; from the Ears mod!
There are additional versions that add breasts from my Better With Breasts pack, and change the ears to be puppy ears. **YOU WILL NEED AN EARS MOD SKIN FOR THE EXTRA PARTS TO SHOW UP (besides the breasts)
Use this [Ears Manipulator Site](https://beta-ears.paw.su/) to start making your Ears skin** Download your preferred version and put it in your **texturepacks** folder!
